name: Security State Bank
description_short: Cheyenne, OK's Security State Bank at 402 E Broadway Ave offers personal banking services.
description_long:
Security State Bank's Cheyenne branch is located at 402 E Broadway Ave in downtown Cheyenne, OK. This standalone bank location serves the local community with full-service banking facilities. While operating hours aren't published online, you can contact the branch directly to confirm when it's open.

At this Cheyenne location, Security State Bank offers personal banking services including account management, deposits, withdrawals, and cash services. The experienced staff is available to assist with account inquiries and financial needs specific to the Cheyenne, OK community.

For Cheyenne residents, this E Broadway Ave location provides convenient banking access during your daily routine. Bring a valid ID when visiting for account-related services. Security State Bank is committed to personalized customer service for your local banking needs.
services: Wire transfer capabilities (implied by banking services)
pros: 24-hour mobile and browser-based account access for convenience
Local community banking with direct branch contact via phone
Serves agricultural customers with Ag News resources and commodity market information
Active Federal Reserve participation indicated by published routing number
Multiple financial calculators provided for payment planning
FDIC insurance protection for deposit accounts
Established community presence serving Western Oklahoma region
cons: Minimal website content—no information on specific account types, rates, or fees
No loan products, credit cards, or business services detailed online
Limited digital presence makes it difficult to research services remotely
Requires phone contact for most product information and account opening
Website does not clearly state FDIC insurance or account protections
best_for: Agricultural customers and farmers in Western Oklahoma seeking community bank relationships
Local residents of Cheyenne and surrounding areas preferring in-person banking
Customers valuing traditional community banking over digital-first institutions
Small business owners in rural Oklahoma communities
diagnosis: Security State Bank is best for customers in Western Oklahoma seeking basic deposit accounts and community banking relationships with local branch access. Primary caveat: the bank provides minimal online product information, requiring direct phone contact for details on services, rates, and account features—unsuitable for consumers preferring transparent online research.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Security State Bank at 402 E Broadway Ave, Cheyenne, OK. Personal banking services.
